result.caveats:
Version history:
6 June 2019
ITOS vetted and configured COD-AB files loaded to HDX
ITOS live services enabled

26 March 2019
Updated COD-AB files loaded to HDX

21 May 2017
Initial upload to HDX
result.license_title: Creative Commons Attribution for Intergovernmental Organisations (CC BY-IGO)
result.methodology_other: Dataset: Downloaded from Central Statistics Office.  Modified by OCHA.
result.name: cod-ab-irq
result.notes:
Iraq administrative level 0-3 boundaries (COD-AB) dataset version 01.  
  
This dataset is structured into 3 levels:  
- Admin 1: 18 Governorate  
- Admin 2: 101 District  
- Admin 3: 294 Sub-district  
  
  
Dates associated with this dataset:  
- 19 December 2024: dataset reviewed for accuracy and completeness  
- 03 June 2019: valid for use by the humanitarian community  
- 05 June 2019: last edit to the dataset before publishing  
- 05 June 2019: boundaries created by the source  
  
Contributed by [OCHA Middle East and North Africa (ROMENA)](https://data.humdata.org/organization/ocha-romena).  
Quality assured, configured, and published by [OCHA Field Information Services (FIS)](https://data.humdata.org/organization/ocha-fiss) and [HDX](https://data.humdata.org/organization/hdx).  
  
Part of the dataset: [Global Subnational Administrative Boundaries](https://data.humdata.org/dataset/cod-ab-global)

organization.name: ocha-fiss
organization.title: OCHA Field Information Services Section (FISS)
organization.description:
UN Office for the Coordination of Humanitarian Affairs - Field Information Services Section based in Geneva, Switzerland.

Generic e-mail (ocha-fis-data@un.org)

result.title: Iraq - Subnational Administrative Boundaries
